data.title: Franco-Nevada Sets May 12 Hybrid AGM as Harquail Hands Chair to Albanese After Record 2025
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Franco-Nevada ( (TSE:FNV) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Franco-Nevada reported that strong production growth and higher gold prices in 2025 drove record revenue, cash flow and earnings, supported by US$1.8 billion of acquisitions over the past two years and the ramp-up of new gold mines. The company increased its dividend for the 19th consecutive year, delivering an annualized 17% shareholder return since its 2007 IPO and ending 2025 with no debt and US$3.1 billion in available capital.

The company scheduled its 2026 annual and special meeting for May 12, 2026 in a hybrid virtual and in-person format to receive 2025 financial statements, elect directors, appoint auditors and hold an advisory vote on executive compensation. Founder and long-time leader David Harquail will not stand for re-election and will become Chair Emeritus, with current lead independent director Tom Albanese expected to be appointed independent non-executive chair, while management highlighted ongoing portfolio growth, potential upside from a possible Cobre Panamá restart, and an outlook for higher gold-equivalent output in 2026.

Franco-Nevada also underscored its strategy of backing strong operators through royalty and stream financing, citing recent deals with Sibanye, G Mining Ventures, Discovery Silver, Orezone Gold, i-80 Gold and Minerals 260 as evidence of the model’s effectiveness. The company emphasized its top-tier ESG ratings and inclusion in Corporate Knights’ Global 100 Most Sustainable Corporations for 2026 as it seeks to solidify its positioning as the preferred gold exposure for diversified investors.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:FNV) stock is a Buy with a C$352.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Franco-Nevada stock, see the TSE:FNV Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on FNV Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, FNV is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by strong financial performance (high profitability and an exceptionally conservative balance sheet) and supportive technicals (clear uptrend with positive momentum). These strengths are partially tempered by a high P/E and modest dividend yield, plus earnings-call risks around cost/depletion pressure and uncertainty tied to Cobre Panama and certain true-ups.

To see Spark’s full report on FNV stock, click here.

More about Franco-Nevada

Franco-Nevada Corporation is a Canadian precious metals-focused royalty and streaming company listed on the TSX and NYSE under the ticker FNV. It provides financing to mining operators in exchange for royalties and streams, with a portfolio heavily weighted to gold but also exposed to platinum group metals and other commodities, positioning itself as a low-risk, asset-light way to invest in the mining sector.

The company targets long-life, high-quality projects globally and markets itself as the “go-to gold stock” for generalist investors, leveraging a large pipeline of over 300 development and exploration-stage royalties. Its business model emphasizes strong balance sheet management, no operating mine exposure, and alignment with operators that maintain high environmental and social standards, which has helped it gain strong ESG ratings and sustainability recognition.

Average Trading Volume: 423,272

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$68.81B

Learn more about FNV stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Northwest Biotherapeutics Completes Advent BioServices Acquisition Deal
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Northwest Biotherapeutics ( (NWBO) ) has shared an update.

On October 24, 2025, Northwest Biotherapeutics, Inc. completed the acquisition of Advent BioServices Ltd., a U.K.-based CDMO that had been providing product development, manufacturing, cryostorage, and distribution services for the company’s DCVax immunotherapy platform. Advent became a wholly owned subsidiary, with consideration structured as approximately $1.9 million in purchase price plus about $8.3 million in settlement of pre-existing payables, payable in installments over two years with interest accruing at 7.5% on unpaid balances.

At closing, Northwest Biotherapeutics also recovered 12 million shares of its common stock and 5.5 million stock options previously issued to Advent as service compensation, retiring the shares to treasury and canceling the options, which reduces potential dilution for existing shareholders. The deal, a related-party transaction due to CEO Linda Powers’ control of the seller, was approved under the company’s related-party policies, and the company obtained a regulatory waiver allowing it not to provide certain historical and pro forma financial statements related to the acquisition.

More about Northwest Biotherapeutics

Northwest Biotherapeutics, Inc. is a biotechnology company focused on developing immunotherapy products, including its DCVax product platform, for the treatment of cancer. The company utilizes contract development and manufacturing services to support product development, manufacturing, cryostorage, and distribution of its DCVax portfolio, particularly its DCVax-L product candidate.

Average Trading Volume: 2,423,789

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $313.2M

data.title: Paramount Skydance Boosts Class B Shares, Warrants Issued
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Paramount Skydance ( (PSKY) ).

On April 7, 2026, Paramount Skydance amended its charter in Delaware to increase authorized Class B shares to 7 billion and allow Class B‑only dividends with Class A consent, bolstering flexibility to issue equity. The move underpins financing for its agreed February 27, 2026 cash acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery at $31 per share and supports a capital structure that preserves voting control with Class A holders.

To fund the WBD deal, PSKY arranged up to $46.97 billion of PIPE commitments led by the Ellison trust and RedBird, backed by an Ellison guarantee covering merger funding, fees and certain damages. Those investors have now syndicated the full equity commitments to a group including Middle Eastern sovereign wealth funds and LionTree via non‑voting Class B stock, broadening the shareholder base while leaving Ellison and RedBird in sole control of all voting shares.

In conjunction with the syndication, PSKY set a floating subscription price for new Class B shares between $12 and $16.02 based on a VWAP formula and scrapped a previously planned rights offering. Instead, all existing non‑affiliate Class B holders will receive listed, 10‑year Nasdaq‑traded warrants as a dividend, exercisable at the same syndication price and callable once the stock trades above $30, a structure the company says offers more tangible value and advances its goal of a wider public float.

The most recent analyst rating on (PSKY) stock is a Hold with a $9.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Paramount Skydance stock, see the PSKY Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on PSKY Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, PSKY is a Neutral.

PSKY scores in the upper-mid range primarily because deteriorating profitability and rising leverage are significant fundamental risks despite improving free cash flow. The earnings call adds support via reaffirmed guidance and accelerating DTC/Paramount+ momentum, while technicals are mixed (stronger short-term trend but weaker long-term setup). Valuation is constrained by losses (negative P/E), and the large M&A-driven corporate event is a potential upside catalyst with material execution/regulatory risk.

To see Spark’s full report on PSKY stock, click here.

More about Paramount Skydance

Paramount Skydance Corporation is a U.S.-based media and entertainment company focused on film, television and streaming content, operating in highly competitive and dynamic global markets. The company derives revenues from content production, distribution, advertising and subscriptions, and is controlled through a dual‑class share structure in which Class A stock carries all voting rights.

Average Trading Volume: 11,981,446

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $10.95B

TriSalus Life Sciences ( (TLSI) ) just unveiled an update.

On April 1, 2026, TriSalus Life Sciences entered into an offer letter with interventional radiologist Richard Marshall, M.D., appointing him Chief Medical Officer with employment commencing June 29, 2026, on a $525,000 base salary, a $250,000 sign-on bonus and eligibility for performance-based bonuses and equity awards. The company formally announced his promotion from Medical Director to full-time CMO in an April 7, 2026 press release, highlighting his frontline oncology and interventional radiology experience as central to advancing its PEDD platform, expanding clinical evidence, and strengthening leadership as it pursues improved treatments for patients with liver and pancreatic tumors.

Dr. Marshall, who has led high-volume interventional oncology practices and developed Louisiana’s first Interventional Radiology Residency, will oversee medical strategy, clinical development, and evidence generation across TriSalus’ programs. His appointment underscores the company’s emphasis on leveraging deep clinical expertise to support broader adoption of its TriNav product suite and PEDD-based therapies, a move expected to influence its competitive position in the solid tumor treatment market and provide added strategic guidance as it completes multiple phase 1 trials.

data.title: Aphoenity International Delays Annual 10-K Filing
data.description:
Luduson G ( (LDSN) ) has released a notification of late filing.

Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Aphoenity International Holdings Inc. has notified regulators that it will be late filing its annual Form 10-K (Yearly Report) for the year ended December 31, 2025. The notification was made via Form 12b-25, signaling a delay in the company’s required yearly disclosure to investors and the market.

The company attributes the delay primarily to the need for additional time for its independent registered public accounting firm to complete its review of the company’s interim financial statements. Management states that filing the Form 10-K (Yearly Report) on time would have required unreasonable effort and expense under the current circumstances.

Aphoenity has indicated that it expects to file the delayed Form 10-K (Yearly Report) within the standard 15-calendar-day extension period allowed under the rules. This suggests the company is targeting a relatively short postponement and aims to bring its reporting back on track quickly.

The company also disclosed that not all of its other required periodic reports over the past 12 months have been filed, with a specific reference to a prior report for June 30, 2025. However, it does not anticipate any significant change in results of operations compared with the prior fiscal year once the new earnings statements are filed.

Because the company does not expect material shifts in its operating results, it has not provided preliminary financial figures or detailed forecasts in this notice. Any forward-looking implications remain limited to expectations around timing of the filing and the assertion that results should be broadly consistent with the previous year.

Aphoenity emphasizes that it is working to complete the audit-related procedures and comply with its ongoing reporting obligations as a U.S.-listed issuer. The notification was signed on April 7, 2026, by Chief Executive Officer Chun Fong SIM, underscoring management’s formal commitment to resolve the delay and file the outstanding Form 10-K (Yearly Report).

More about Luduson G

Aphoenity International Holdings Inc., formerly known as Luduson G, is a Hong Kong–based company with its principal executive office in Wanchai. It is a U.S.-reporting issuer that files annual reports on Form 10-K (Yearly Report) and is subject to the periodic reporting requirements of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $619.8K

Learn more about LDSN stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Bluejay Nears Completion of Pivotal SYMON-II Sepsis Trial
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Bluejay Diagnostics ( (BJDX) ).

On April 7, 2026, Bluejay Diagnostics, Inc. reported that it has successfully enrolled 624 patients in its ongoing SYMON-II pivotal clinical trial, which is evaluating the Symphony IL-6 test for determining patient acuity in sepsis triage and monitoring in critical care settings. The trial targets 750 patients, and the company said it expects to complete enrollment within the next two to three months, noting that its inclusion and exclusion criteria have not led to significant patient exclusions.

SYMON-II is part of Bluejay’s broader SYMON clinical program, which includes pilot and pivotal studies designed to establish IL-6 levels associated with mortality and infection severity, and is intended to support a future 510(k) submission to the U.S. Food and Drug Administration. With enrollment in SYMON-II nearing completion, Bluejay signaled that it is moving closer to full clinical validation and subsequent regulatory steps for its Symphony IL-6 test, a critical path for bringing its rapid, near-patient sepsis diagnostic into the U.S. market and potentially strengthening its position in the critical care diagnostics segment.

The most recent analyst rating on (BJDX) stock is a Hold with a $2.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Bluejay Diagnostics stock, see the BJDX Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on BJDX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BJDX is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by very weak financial performance (minimal revenue, persistent losses, and significant cash burn) and a bearish technical setup (below major moving averages with negative MACD). Positive corporate progress on the Symphony IL-6 program and manufacturing readiness provides some offset, but valuation remains constrained by loss-making fundamentals and no dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on BJDX stock, click here.

More about Bluejay Diagnostics

Bluejay Diagnostics, Inc. is a medical diagnostics company developing the Symphony System, a cost-effective, rapid, near-patient testing platform aimed at sepsis triage and monitoring disease progression in critical care. Its lead product candidate, the Symphony IL-6 Test for sepsis, is designed to deliver accurate results in about 20 minutes to support earlier and better triage and treatment decisions, but it has not yet received U.S. regulatory clearance.

The company’s strategy centers on near-patient testing and real-time monitoring in acute care environments, positioning Symphony as a tool to help clinicians quickly assess patient severity and guide timely interventions. Bluejay must obtain authorization from the U.S. Food and Drug Administration before marketing Symphony as a diagnostic product in the United States, making successful clinical validation a key milestone for its commercialization path.

Average Trading Volume: 232,177

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $2M

data.description:

An update from Black Titan ( (BTTC) ) is now available.

On April 3, 2026, Black Titan released a research-focused update outlining how DeFi-as-a-Service and Lending-as-a-Service markets are rapidly diversifying beyond Ethereum-centric ecosystems. The note highlights rising adoption of Solana-based lending by Latin American neobanks, the growth of restaking-as-a-service for yield-hungry European and EMEA fintechs and the use of Avalanche Evergreen subnets to tokenize private credit for retail and SME access.

The company also details how global payment processors are shifting toward “yield routing” APIs that automatically deploy idle stablecoin balances into on-chain lending, signaling a convergence between digital banking and institutional DeFi. Black Titan argues that protocol monopolies are fading as prime brokers become key API gateways and projects regulatory and interoperability shifts that could reshape digital asset infrastructure for neobanks and payment firms in the coming quarters.

data.title: QNB Completes Victory Bancorp Acquisition and Board Expansion
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

QNB ( (QNBC) ) has shared an announcement.

On April 1, 2026, QNB Corp. completed its previously announced all‑stock acquisition of Victory Bancorp, Inc., merging Victory into QNB and combining The Victory Bank with QNB Bank, with QNB Bank as the surviving Pennsylvania‑chartered state bank. Each Victory common share was converted into 0.55 QNB common shares, QNB’s outstanding shares were unchanged, and Victory Bank will operate as a division of QNB Bank during an interim period while systems and operations are integrated.

QNB added former Victory chief executive Joseph W. Major and independent director Kevin L. Johnson to its board, signaling an effort to preserve local expertise as it expands its footprint. Victory Bank’s systems are slated to convert to QNB over the weekend of June 19–21, 2026, after which Victory locations will reopen on June 22 as fully integrated QNB Bank branches, giving customers access to 14 full‑service offices across Montgomery, Bucks, and Lehigh counties and reinforcing QNB’s regional community banking franchise.

The most recent analyst rating on (QNBC) stock is a Buy with a $45.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on QNB stock, see the QNBC Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on QNBC Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, QNBC is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by moderate financial performance, where improving cash-flow quality and normalized leverage are offset by the sharp 2025 revenue contraction and reduced margins. Valuation is a clear positive (low P/E and healthy yield), technicals are neutral-to-mixed, and the approved merger adds a supportive corporate catalyst.

To see Spark’s full report on QNBC stock, click here.

More about QNB

QNB Corp. is a financial holding company for QNB Bank and its division, Victory Bank, headquartered in Quakertown, Pennsylvania, with branch operations across Bucks, Lehigh, Montgomery, and Berks counties. The banks provide commercial, small business, and personal banking services, borrowing solutions, cash management, securities and advisory services through QNB Financial Services, and title insurance via Laurel Abstract Company LLC.

QNB’s community banking model targets customers in its regional Pennsylvania footprint, combining traditional branch banking with investment and advisory offerings to deepen relationships and broaden fee-based income streams.

On April 1, 2026, Haymaker Acquisition Corp. 4 entered into a non-redemption agreement with an existing shareholder, securing the reversal of a prior redemption election and the continued holding and pro-business-combination vote of 250,000 Class A public shares in exchange for a cash payment formula tied to the final redemption price. On April 6, 2026, Haymaker and PubCo also struck a prepaid forward purchase agreement with several Harraden Circle funds for up to 5 million shares, providing immediate trust-funded cash at the business combination redemption price while locking in those investors’ waiver of redemption rights and creating a structured mechanism for unwinding the position post-closing.

At extraordinary and special meetings held on April 2, 2026, Haymaker shareholders and warrantholders approved all proposals necessary to advance the merger with Suncrete, including the business combination and domestication, new organizational documents, NYSE share issuance authorization for up to 55.9 million PubCo Class A shares tied to the deal and PIPE, new 2026 omnibus incentive and employee stock purchase plans, as well as warrant amendments and adjournment flexibilities. The approvals, combined with the non-redemption and forward purchase arrangements, bolster the minimum cash profile for the de-SPAC transaction, enhance deal certainty, and set the capital and governance framework for Suncrete, Inc. as it prepares to operate as a publicly listed company.

More about Haymaker Acquisition Corporation 4 Class A

Haymaker Acquisition Corp. 4 is a special purpose acquisition company (SPAC) formed to merge with or acquire an operating business, and it has entered into a business combination agreement with Concrete Partners Holding, LLC, which will result in a combined entity known as Suncrete, Inc. The transaction is structured to domesticate Haymaker from the Cayman Islands to Delaware and list the post-combination company’s Class A common stock on a U.S. exchange, supported by a PIPE investment and new equity incentive and employee stock purchase plans.

Hologic ( (HOLX) ) has provided an announcement.

On April 7, 2026, Hologic completed its acquisition by funds managed by Blackstone and TPG in a transaction valued at up to $79 per share, turning the women’s health specialist into a privately held company with minority backing from ADIA and GIC. Hologic shareholders are set to receive $76 in cash plus a non‑tradable contingent value right tied to revenue milestones in the Breast Health business, while its Nasdaq-listed common stock has ceased trading and will be delisted, leaving the company a wholly owned subsidiary of the buyout consortium.

The merger triggered a comprehensive reshaping of Hologic’s capital structure, governance and incentives, including cash and CVR-based treatment of options and stock awards and the cancellation of high-strike options with no payout. Longtime chief executive Stephen MacMillan resigned with closing, with veteran medtech executive José (Joe) E. Almeida appointed CEO and sole director, signaling an intensified private equity-backed push to accelerate growth and innovation in women’s health technologies.

On April 7, 2026, Perma-Pipe International Holdings’ Board appointed energy executive Nancy Zakhour and President and CEO Saleh Sagr to its Board of Directors, with both appointments effective April 8, 2026. Zakhour joins as an independent director and will serve on the Audit, Compensation, and Nominating and Corporate Governance Committees, while Sagr, as an executive officer, becomes a non-independent director and will not sit on any Board committees.

Zakhour brings a blend of renewable energy, oil and gas, carbon management and capital markets experience, including leadership roles in battery storage and solar at Clean Energy Services and prior work on Direct Air Capture and carbon capture projects at Oxy Low Carbon Ventures. Her appointment is framed as strengthening Perma-Pipe’s strategic capabilities and aligning Board oversight with the global energy transition, while Sagr’s addition recognizes his operational track record and is intended to deepen management representation in Board-level decisions as the company pursues long-term growth.

data.description:

Eco Wave Power Global ( (WAVE) ) has provided an update.

Eco Wave Power Global AB, a Nasdaq-traded leader in onshore wave energy, develops patented systems that generate renewable electricity from waves using floaters mounted on existing coastal structures. The company focuses on supplying clean power close to coastal population centers and infrastructure, including ports, industrial facilities and data centers that face rising electricity demand.

On April 7, 2026, Eco Wave Power reported March 2026 production results from its EWP-EDF One pilot project at Jaffa Port, Israel, where continuous operation and roughly six days of 1–2 meter waves produced over 1,200 kWh of electricity. The system has recorded zero downtime in wave heights of 1 meter and above since early 2025, reinforcing the durability and scalability of its onshore technology and underscoring its potential to power coastal AI and data-center infrastructure amid growing attention, including a mention in NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang’s GTC keynote.

The most recent analyst rating on (WAVE) stock is a Hold with a $6.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Eco Wave Power Global stock, see the WAVE Stock Forecast page.

To see Spark’s full report on WAVE stock, click here.

More about Eco Wave Power Global

Eco Wave Power Global AB is a Nasdaq-listed renewable energy company specializing in onshore wave energy technology that converts ocean and sea waves into clean, reliable and cost-efficient electricity. By installing patented floaters on existing coastal infrastructure such as breakwaters, jetties and piers, it targets power delivery near coastal cities, ports, data centers and other energy-intensive shoreline facilities.

The company operates Israel’s first grid-connected wave energy power station at Jaffa Port, recognized as a pioneering technology by the Israeli Ministry of Energy and co-funded by EDF Power Solutions, and has launched a pilot station at the Port of Los Angeles with Shell Marine Renewable Energy. It is expanding a 404.7 MW global project pipeline in markets including Portugal, Taiwan and India, backed by support from European and international climate and innovation programs.
